evidence: V clarified the current mission: "We're not trying to make this a viable business. We're trying to get it sold." Consequently, any work (like Ilya's pricing models) should be evaluated based on whether it makes the company "look good" to a buyer or VC.
base marketing/sales materials on current customers (the "bird in the hand") rather than enterprise hypotheses.
encountering fake LinkedIn profiles and AI avatars in calls.
the "uselessness" of Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) and the influx of low-quality, bot-driven applications on LinkedIn.
break down the messaging into daily, themed chunks. This addresses the short attention span of LinkedIn users and allows for deeper dives into specific value propositions.
The primary objective identified was reaching founders. The strategy involves using "David" as a case study to highlight pain points and show how Careerspan solves them.
